item.title: 使用 IntelliJs 问题导航提高生产力 | Increased productivity with IntelliJs Issue Navigation
item.description:
今天，我想向您展示IntelliJ IDEA中的一个方便的功能，它可以让您在尝试理解特定代码部分时更轻松地进行日常工作。

当检测到 id-pattern 时，只需单击 ticket-id，您就可以直接从Version Control或Annotate-Sidebar导航到相应的 JIRA-Page。

用例

在企业环境、更大的团队或项目中工作时，您可能会使用像Atlassian JIRA这样的问题跟踪软件。 根据您的提交规则的严格程度，您必须在提交消息中写入票号。 这种常见的做法将帮助其他人更好地理解变更的背景。 此外，在查看工单时，会有详细的描述，可能还会在评论部分进行讨论，这将有助于理解做出某些决定的原因。

在软件开发过程中，您会偶然发现想要更详细了解的代码。 因此，您可能正在使用带有 Git Blame 的注释功能来获得对当前行或部分的更多见解。 当提交消息中有票号时，您可能会将其复制出来，手动导航到 JIRA，然后将票号粘贴到搜索栏中。
它将票证 ID 与 JIRA 页面映射，并使票证 ID 在整个 IDE 中可单击。

  • 提高您的生产力
  • 很好地集成到 IDE
  • 它使日常工作更轻松

配置

您可以在设置菜单中启用和配置问题导航。
可以通过在示例部分输入您的票证 ID 来检查您的表达式是否有效，您将看到问题链接是否正确生成。

表达式： [A-Za-z\d]+-\d+

链接： https://example.atlassian.net/browse/$0 ://example.atlassian.net/browse/$0

感谢您的阅读！ 如果您知道其他鲜为人知的技巧或有反馈要分享，请随时在评论中写下。
也欢迎您与其他朋友和同事分享本指南。 谢谢！



原文:

Today I want to present you a handy feature within IntelliJ IDEA that will make your everyday work easier when trying to understand specific code parts.

It enables you to navigate directly from the Version Control or Annotate-Sidebar to the corresponding JIRA-Page by simply clicking at the ticket-id, when the id-pattern is detected.

Use Case

When working in a corporate environment, bigger team or project, you probably use an Issue Tracking Software like Atlassian JIRA. Depending on how strict your commit rules are, you will have to write the ticket number within the commit messages. This common practice will help other people to understand the context of the change better. Furthermore, when looking at a ticket, there is a detailed description and maybe a discussion within the comment section, which will help to understand why certain decisions were made.

During software development, you will stumble across code that you want to understand in more detail. Therefore you are probably using the Annotate with Git Blame feature to get more insights of the current line or section. When there is a ticket number in the commit message, you probably copy it out, navigate manually to JIRA, and paste the ticket number into the search bar.
IntelliJ´s Issue Navigation feature is the solution for this manual and annoying process. It maps the ticket-id with the JIRA page and makes the ticket-ids clickable across the whole IDE.

  • Improves your productivity
  • Well integrated into the IDE
  • It makes the everyday work easier

Configuration

You can enable and configure the issue navigation within the settings menu.
It is possible to check if your expression is working by entering your ticket-id in the Example section and you will see if the issue link is generated correctly.

Expression: [A-Za-z\d]+-\d+

Link: https://example.atlassian.net/browse/$0

Thank you for reading! If you know other less-known tips or have feedback to share, feel free to write it in the comments.
You’re also welcome to share this guide with other friends and colleagues. Thanks!
item.author: dacbreakpoint

item.title: 软件驱动的组织 | Software-Driven Organizations
item.description:
你好开发社区！

感谢所有关于系统和项目框架各个方面的建设性课程和讨论！

在这篇文章中，我想探讨一些关于在组织内工作的事情，这些事情对于那些从外部申请的人来说可能并不那么明显。

多年前，人们普遍认为，组织🏢只接受具有声望教育记录的人员，或具有丰富管理经验的人员。 一旦进入，他们将获得尽可能多的津贴，就像他们要求的那样。 他们在公司里的影响力最大。🏯

软件部门

但是软件驱动的公司是不同的。 开发人员构建它们，☁️ 云☁️ 支持它们，来自多个国家的人们依赖于他们的 API 和其他开源库。

要成为其中的一员，您只需像在任何其他学科中一样利用软件方面的培训和承诺。 这些公司中的大多数鼓励公开对话🗣和头脑风暴🙇‍♀️就他们应该前进的方向，最好的想法通常会得到批准。 工作问题

自 nCOV-19 爆发以来，关于远程工作组和数字会议的价值的讨论越来越多。 可悲的是，尽管有最佳实践，🚓🌡网络安全警报也出现了激增

访问管理和加密（ https://www.simplilearn.com/data-encryption-methods-article ）



原文:

Hello Dev Community!

Thanks for all the constructive lessons and discussions about various aspects of systems and project frameworks!

In this post, I'd like to explore some things about working within an organization that might not be so apparent to those who apply from the outside.

Years ago, the common belief was that organisations 🏢 accepted only personnel with prestigious educational records ,or those with extensive experience as managers. Once in, they would obtain as much ,by way of perks, as they requested for. They had the most influence in the company.🏯

Software Sector

But software-driven companies ARE different. Developers build them, ☁️ clouds ☁️ support them, and people from several countries depend on their APIs and other open-source libraries.

To be part of one, you simply draw upon training and commitment in software as you would do in any other discipline. Most of these companies encourage open dialogue🗣 and brainstorming 🙇‍♀️ over the direction they should be headed, and the best ideas usually get greenlit. 💚

Work Concerns

Ever since the outbreak of nCOV-19, there have been more discussions about the value of remote workgroups and digital conferencing. Sadly, there has also been an upsurge in 🚓🌡cybersecurity alerts, despite best practices

of access management and encryption (https://www.simplilearn.com/data-encryption-methods-article)
item.author: xinusys

item.title: 这是解决方案.. | Dev server not running after `npm start`??? Here's the solution..
item.description:
萨迪克1029

发表于如果您看过ReactJS上的编码教程，您可能遇到过必须从 Github 存储库下载代码才能跟随教程学习的情况。 当时我正在观看有关React的framer-motion库的 YouTube 视频课程。 该课程要求我下载一些入门代码才能开始。 我按照说明克隆了存储库并运行了命令npm run start 。 服务器未启动并显示一些错误。 我试图弄清楚它很长一段时间，并一直在寻找解决方案。 我在 Google、Stack Overflow 和 YouTube 上进行了搜索，但没有找到完全解决我问题的任何内容。 最后，我向 Stack Overflow 提出了一个问题，但我没有得到任何可以解决我的问题的适当答案。

我删除了node_modules文件夹并再次运行npm install并尝试运行开发服务器，但没有任何效果。


突然，我意识到在安装依赖项后，我遇到了严重的漏洞问题，npm 告诉我运行npm audit fix来修复问题。

我这样做了，但开发服务器仍然无法正常工作。 在 npm 建议运行npm audit fix之后，它还建议运行npm audit fix-f并警告应用程序中断。 我忽略了警告并运行了命令，令人惊讶的是，开发服务器正在浏览器上运行。 该命令实际上所做的是更新react-scripts依赖项。


您可能必须使用旧的React应用程序并且可能会遇到此问题。 我希望这些命令中的任何一个都可以解决您的问题。

警告：不要更新所有依赖项，如果 React 版本旧，这可能会导致整个应用程序无法运行。



原文:

Sadiq1029

Posted on May 26

If you have seen coding tutorials on ReactJS, you might have encountered the situation where you have to download code from a Github repo to follow along with the tutorial. I was watching a YouTube video course about the framer-motion library for React at the time. The course required me to download some starter code to get started. I followed the instructions and cloned the repository and ran the command npm run start. The server was not starting and was showing some errors. I tried to figure it out for a long time and kept searching for a solution.  I searched on Google, Stack Overflow, and YouTube but didn't find anything that completely solved my problem. At last, I threw a question at Stack Overflow, but I didn't get any appropriate answer that could solve my problem. 

I deleted the node_modules folder and ran npm install again and tried to run the development server, but nothing worked.


Suddenly, I realized that after the installation of dependencies, I was getting severe vulnerability issues and npm was telling me to run npm audit fix to fix the issues.  

I did so, but still the development server was not working. Right after npm suggests running npm audit fix, it also gives a recommendation to run npm audit fix-f with a warning of breaking the application. I ignored the warning and ran the command and, surprisingly, the dev server was running on the browser. What this command actually did is update the react-scripts dependency. 


You might have to work with the old React application and might encounter this issue. **The solution is: just run npm audit fix-f or you can manually update the react-scripts dependency only. Either of these commands will fix your issue I hope.

WARNING: don't update all of the dependencies, which might cause the whole application to fail to run if the version of React is old.
item.author: sadiq1029

item.title: Codiga 更新：VS 代码插件 | Codiga Updates: VS Code Plugin
item.description:
我们不断更新我们的产品以提供出色的用户体验。 上周，我们更新了 VS Code 插件以提供更无缝的体验。 现在搜索面板更具交互性且易于使用。 可以更容易地找到智能代码片段。 我们更接近通过此更新为您提供丰富的用户体验。

现在，您将能够比以前更轻松地创建、共享和导入可重复使用的智能代码片段。

交互式搜索面板
  • 删除了旧的搜索栏
  • 修正了一些小错误
  • 改进的代码建议

    • 要获得最新更新，请安装最新版本的 Codiga 编码助手。 这可以通过访问VS Code 市场来完成。 更新后，您可以使用我们的最新功能。

    如果您不知道，我们有不同的智能代码片段隐私模式。 随着智能代码片段数量的增加，从旧的搜索栏中搜索和区分它们是一项挑战。 我们在 VS Code 插件中引入了全新的搜索面板来解决这个问题。 我们很快也会为我们的 Jetbrains 插件带来类似的更新。

    交互式搜索面板

    通过新的更新，您可以使用搜索过滤器区分此面板中的不同代码片段。

    搜索过滤器具有以下选项：

    1. 所有片段- 所有全局代码片段（包括公共和私有代码片段）
    2. 公共代码片段- 所有公共代码片段
    3. 私有代码片段- 您帐户中的所有私有代码片段
    4. 收藏的代码片段- 您添加为收藏的所有代码片段

    您可以在使用新更新将代码片段插入代码库之前预览它们。 这将帮助您避免代码中的任何错误。

    我们通过 VS Code 中的最新更新，使您可以更轻松地使用我们的上下文智能代码片段添加代码片段。 在您的代码中使用它们会容易得多。

    智能代码片段是常规代码片段的增强版本。 可以使用 Codiga 插件之一直接在 VS Code 和其他 IDE 中填充智能代码片段。

    您可以在 Codiga Hub 上搜索智能代码片段，您可以在其中按名称、关键字或与您要查找的代码相关联的标签进行过滤。 一旦你找到一个你想要使用的，喜欢它，然后它会通过几个简短的命令直接填充到你选择的 IDE 上。

    智能代码片段是代码片段的增强版本，具有一些额外的优点，例如：

    • 名称：解释片段功能的单词/句子。
    • 语言：代码片段的编程语言。
    • 依赖关系：片段依赖的框架库（例如 React、NextJS 等）。
    • 占位符：用户可以自定义的片段的一部分。
    • 描述: 解释片段功能的多个句子。
    • 关键字：有助于找到搜索引擎的片段。
    • 标签：组织片段的标签列表

    使片段与上下文相关，这意味着我们的引擎将根据您正在处理的文件、您正在编码的语言以及您正在使用的框架/库来建议片段。

    如果您想了解更多有关智能代码片段的信息，可以阅读此博客。

    如何打开搜索面板？

    和之前一样，您可以使用 CMD + SHIFT + C[Mac]/ CTRL + ALT + C [Windows] 直接打开搜索栏。 这将打开一个搜索栏，您可以在其中继续搜索所有代码片段。

    请注意，所有结果都是上下文相关的，这意味着我们会根据您所在的文件、您正在编码的语言或您使用的框架/库来建议代码片段。

    在下一次更新中会发生什么？

    • 增强的代码建议。
    • 更优质的智能代码片段。
    • 流行的 SDK 和框架代码片段支持。
    • 更好的用户体验。
    • 惊人的代码体验。

    如果您有任何建议，请随时发送至support@codiga.io 。

    资源：

    该博客最初发布在Codiga上。



    原文:

    We are constantly updating our product to provide a great user experience. Last week, we updated our VS Code Plugin to give a more seamless experience. Now the search panel is much more interactive and easy to use. The Smart Code Snippets can be found much easier. We are one step closer to providing you with a rich user experience with this update.

    Now, you will be able to create, share, and import reusable Smart Code Snippets much easier than before.

    What’s new in version 0.5.3?

    • Interactive search panel
    • Removed old search bar
    • Minor bug fixes
    • Improved code recommendations

    To get the latest update, please install the newest version of the Codiga Coding Assistant. This can be done by visiting the VS Code marketplace. Once updated, you can use our latest features.

    We have different privacy modes for Smart Code Snippets, if you don't know. With an increasing number of Smart Code Snippets, it was challenging to search for and differentiate between them from the old search bar. We introduced the all-new search panel in the VS Code plugin to solve this problem. We are soon bringing a similar update for our Jetbrains plugin as well.

    Interactive search panel

    Codiga’s Smart Code Snippets VS Code Plugin allows you to search for a code snippet on the VS Code interface.

    With the new update, you can differentiate among different code snippets from this panel using the search filter.

    The search filter has the following options:

    1. All Snippets - All global code snippets (Including public & private code snippets)
    2. Public Code Snippets - All public code snippets
    3. Private Code Snippets - All private code snippets in your account
    4. Favourite Code Snippets - All code snippets you have added as a favourite

    You can preview the code snippets before inserting them into your codebase with the new update. This will help you avoid any mistakes in your code.

    We have made it much easier for you to add code snippets with our contextual Smart Code Snippets with the latest update in VS Code. It will be much easier to use them in your code.

    Smart Code Snippets are the enhanced version of regular code snippets. Codiga’s Coding Assistant tool houses a growing library of Smart Code Snippets added and vetted by thousands of other developers who use our platform. Smart Code Snippets can be populated directly in VS Code and other IDEs using one of the Codiga plugins.

    You can search for a Smart Code Snippet on Codiga Hub, where you can filter by name, keywords, or tags associated with the piece of code you are looking for. Once you find one that you want to use, favour it, and it will then populate directly on your chosen IDE with just a few short commands.

    A Smart Code Snippet is an enhanced version of a code snippet with some additional advantages such as:

    • Name: Words/sentence that explains what the snippets do.
    • Language: The programming language of the code snippet.
    • Dependencies: what libraries of framework the snippet depends on (e.g. React, NextJS, etc.).
    • Placeholders: part of the snippet that the user can customise.
    • Description: multiple sentences that explain what the snippet does.
    • Keywords: helps to find the snippets for search engine.
    • Tags: list of tags to organize the snippet

    Make the snippet contextual, which means our engines will suggest snippets based on the file you're working on, the language you're coding & the framework/library you're using.

    If you want to know more about smart code snippets, you can read this blog.

    How to open the search panel?

    Well like before you can directly open the search bar using CMD + SHIFT + C[Mac]/ CTRL + ALT + C [Windows]. This will open up a search bar where you can go ahead and search all your code snippets.

    Note that all the results are contextual, which means we suggest code snippets based on what file you are on, what language you are coding or the framework/library you are using.

    What to expect in the next update?

    • Enhanced Code recommendations.
    • More quality smart code snippets.
    • Popular SDKs & Framework code snippet support.
    • Better user experience.
    • Amazing code experience.

    If you have any suggestions, please feel free to drop them off at support@codiga.io.

    Resources:

    This blog was originally posted on Codiga.
item.author: _khalidkhan_

item.title: 在不到一分钟的时间内从数百个来源获取数据 | Fetch data from hundreds of sources in less than minute
item.description:
麦克洛加丘克

发表于想象一下，您有数百家商店使用特定类型的数据库（例如 Oracle），尽管有将数据从它们导出到您公司数据库的机制。 您需要检查是否没有遗漏任何内容。

目标

通常，您会获取商店列表并对其进行迭代以获取数据，与目标数据合并并搜索丢失的数据。

获取所有数据（例如收据）并使用经典循环检查其一致性可能非常耗时。

理论

获取相应日期的计算销售计数并将其与您的内部系统进行比较，如果发现不一致 - 仅在已发现的那些商店中搜索，这不是更容易吗？

表现

虽然通常for loop还不错，但循环超过 500 个商店的想法却不是。

然而，Python 有一个称为并行性的模块，我们可以在一个循环中一次生成多个进程，并将处理速度从 30 分钟缩短到 50 秒。

代码起点

由于我们需要将 Oracle 与 SQL Server 连接起来，因此我们将使用自定义类，这些类允许我们将数据直接提取到 Pandas 数据帧中并根据我们的需要整理数据。

鉴于我们的类以与此类似的方式编写，首先我们需要创建一个从存储中查询数据的函数：

 from datetime import date , timedelta from dateutil.relativedelta import relativedelta yesterday : str = str (( date . today ()) - timedelta ( days = 1 )) last_three_days : str = str (( date . today ()) - timedelta ( days = 3 )) last_seven_days : str = str (( date . today ()) - timedelta ( days = 7 )) last_half_month : str = str (( date . today ()) - timedelta ( days = 14 )) last_month : str = str (( date . today ()) - relativedelta ( months =+ 1 )) last_quarter : str = str (( date . today ()) - relativedelta ( months =+ 3 )) last_year : str = str (( date . today ()) - relativedelta ( months =+ 12 )) today : str = str (( date . today ())) def query_data_from_store ( store : str ): """ Fetch data from stores Args: store -> str """ date_from = last_year logger . info ( f "Connecting to store: { store } with date from: { date_from } " ) store_connection = OracleConnection ( f " { store } ORASERV" , STORE_USR , STORE_PWD , STORE_SID , 666 ) result = store_connection . query ( orasql_store_sales_count_query . format ( date_from , yesterday )) return result

通常我会将query添加到函数中，但由于我们将始终对这项工作使用相同的查询，因此可以将其硬编码到函数本身中。

从每个商店获取的数据如下所示：

店铺发售日期在几秒钟内使用线程获取数据

然后我们创建一个函数，该函数一次使​​用 20 个线程迭代query_data_from_store和存储列表：

 def process_data (): """ Process data fetched from stores """ # Create connection with pre-erp database logger . info ( "Connecting to PRE-ERP Database and getting the sales count." ) warehouse = SqlServerConnection ( STAGING_HOST , STAGING_DB ) # Get production stores into list stores_df = warehouse . query ( mssql_prod_stores_list ) stores_list = stores_df [ "store" ]. to_list () # Remove badly configured stores, for testing / debug purposes: unwanted_stores = { "X1234" , "X002" , "X3596" , "X991" } stores_list = [ element for element in stores_list if element not in unwanted_stores ] # Iterate over query function using 20 threads using stores list pool = multiprocessing . Pool ( 20 ) result = pool . map ( query_data_from_store , stores_list ) pool . close () pool . join () return result

分析异常情况

最后是分析数据（通常我们将结果放入表格中，然后在我们的 BI 中将其可视化为错误）。

出于文章的目的，我们将在比较过程中发现的所有不一致记录到文件中：

 def check_store_receipts_integrity (): """Check sales data integrity using direct stores connection.""" date_from = last_year multiprocessing . freeze_support () start_data_fetch_time = timer () results = process_data () pos_quantity = pd . concat ( results , ignore_index = True , axis = 0 ) end_data_fetch_time = timer () # Create connection with PRE-ERP database warehouse = SqlServerConnection ( STAGING_HOST , STAGING_DB ) start_processing_time = timer () # Get receipts count per store and day from sales table target_quantity = warehouse . query ( mssql_get_target_receipts_count . format ( date_from , yesterday )) # Some type refactoring store_quantity . store = store_quantity . store . astype ( str ) store_quantity . sale_date = store_quantity . sale_date . astype ( str ) target_quantity . store = target_quantity . store . astype ( str ) target_quantity . sale_date = target_quantity . sale_date . astype ( str ) # Merge dataframes with stores quantity logger . info ( "Merging both data sources into one." ) difference_temp = pd . merge ( target_quantity , store_quantity , how = "left" , on = [ "store" , "sale_date" ]) # Generate differences logger . info ( "Generating differences." ) difference_temp [ "difference" ] = ( difference_temp [ "store_quantity" ] - difference_temp [ "target_quantity" ]) missing_in_target = difference_temp [ difference_temp [ "difference" ] > 0 ] # Print info about differences in console logger . info ( "Checking if differences exist." ) if len ( missing_in_target ) > 0 : logger . warning ( "The inconsistency in data has been found. Starting row by row comparison..." ) # Get missing in target sales data logger . info ( "Generating temp variables." ) receipts_from_store = pd . DataFrame () receipts_from_target = pd . DataFrame () results_from_stores_and_target = pd . DataFrame () if str ( type ( missing_in_target )) in """<class 'pandas.core.frame.DataFrame'>""" : missing_in_target_list = missing_in_target [[ "store" , "receipt_date" ]] for i , row in missing_in_terg_list . iterrows (): store : str = str ( row [ "store" ]) sale_date : str = str ( row [ "sale_date" ]) server : str = str ( store + "ORASERV" ) logger . info ( f "Connecting to store: { store } with date: { sale_date } " ) store_connection = OracleConnection ( server , STORE_USR , STORE_PWD , STORE_SID , 666 ) temp_stores = store_connection . query ( orasql_get_store_receipts_for_specific_day . format ( receipt_date )) receipts_from_store = pd . concat ([ receipts_from_store , temp_stores ], ignore_index = True , axis = 0 ) temp_target = warehouse . query ( mssql_get_target_receipts_for_specific_day . format ( store , receipt_date )) receipts_from_target = pd . concat ([ receipts_from_target , temp_target ], ignore_index = True , axis = 0 ) receipts_from_store [ "erp_number" ] = receipts_from_store [ "store" ] + "/" + receipts_from_market [ "salenumber" ] receipts_from_target [ "erp_number" ] = receipts_from_target [ "store" ] + "/" + receipts_from_target [ "document_number" ] if receipts_from_store . equals ( receipts_from_target ) is False : results_from_stores_and_target = pd . merge ( receipts_from_stores , receipts_from_target , how = "left" , on = "ax_number" , indicator = True ) results_from_stores_and_target = results_from_stores_and_target . rename ( columns = { "store_x" : "store" , "sale_date_x" : "date" , "sale_id_x" : "id" , "sale_number_x" : "number" , "sale_value_x" : "value" , "erp_number" : "erpnumber" , "store_y" : "store" , "sale_date_y" : "saledate" , "sale_id_y" : "saleid" , "sale_number_y" : "salenumber" , "sale_value_y" : "salevalue" , "_merge" : "ismissing" } ) else : logger . info ( "Compared data row by row and found nothing." ) if len ( results_from_stores_and_target ) > 0 : # warehouse.push_data(results_from_stores_and_target, 'stores_integrity_report', 'staging') if os . path . exists ( "./data/processed/store_integrity_checks.csv" ): os . remove ( "./data/processed/store_integrity_checks.csv" ) logger . info ( "Cleaning .csv file for reimport." ) else : logger . warning ( "The .csv file does not exist..." ) if os . path . exists ( "./data/processed/store_integrity_checks.xlsx" ): os . remove ( "./data/processed/store_integrity_checks.xlsx" ) logger . info ( "Cleaning .xlsx file for reimport." ) else : logger . warning ( "The .xlsx file does not exist..." ) results_from_stores_and_target = results_from_stores_and_target [ results_from_stores_and_target [ "ismissing" ] == "left_only" ] results_from_stores_and_target . to_csv ( "./data/processed/pos_integrity_checks.csv" , index = False ) results_from_stores_and_target . to_excel ( "./data/processed/pos_integrity_checks.xlsx" , index = False ) if len ( results_from_stores_and_target ) > 0 : logger . warning ( f "Found and exported: { len ( results_from_stores_and_target ) } inconsistencies to file." ) else : logger . info ( "There are no missing sales in PRE-ERP." ) end_processing_time = timer () logger . info ( f "Fetched rows from stores in: { ( end_data_fetch_time - start_data_fetch_time ): 0.4 f } " f "seconds, while data processing took: { ( end_processing_time - start_processing_time ): 0.4 f } ." )

哇！

我们不仅将来自多个来源的数据与我们的目标数据库进行了比较，而且还使用了将我们的处理速度从 30 分钟缩短到大约 1 分钟左右的并行性。



原文:

mikelogaciuk

Posted on May 26

Imagine you have hundreds of stores that use specific type of database (e.g. Oracle) and despite having mechanisms that export data from them into your company database. You need to check if nothing has been missing.

Aim

Normally you would get list of stores and iterate over them in order to fetch data, merge with target data and search for missing data.

Getting all the data e.g. receipts and checking it's consistency altogether with classic loop can be time consuming.

Theory

Would it not be easier to fetch calculated sales count with corresponding day and compare it with your internal system and if inconsistency is found - to search only at those stores were it has been found?

Performance

While normally the for loop is not bad, the idea of loop over 500 stores is not.

However Python has module called parallelism were we can spawn multiple processes at once within a loop and speedup processing from 30 minutes to 50 seconds.

Code starting point

Since we need to connect Oracle with SQL Server, we will use custom classes that allow us to fetch data directly into Pandas data frames and wrangle data for our needs.

Given we have our classes written in a similar way to this, first we need to create a function that queries data from stores:

from datetime import date, timedelta
from dateutil.relativedelta import relativedelta yesterday: str = str((date.today()) - timedelta(days=1))
last_three_days: str = str((date.today()) - timedelta(days=3))
last_seven_days: str = str((date.today()) - timedelta(days=7))
last_half_month: str = str((date.today()) - timedelta(days=14))
last_month: str = str((date.today()) - relativedelta(months=+1))
last_quarter: str = str((date.today()) - relativedelta(months=+3))
last_year: str = str((date.today()) - relativedelta(months=+12))
today: str = str((date.today())) def query_data_from_store(store: str): """ Fetch data from stores Args: store -> str """ date_from = last_year logger.info(f"Connecting to store: {store} with date from: {date_from}") store_connection = OracleConnection( f"{store}ORASERV", STORE_USR, STORE_PWD, STORE_SID, 666) result = store_connection.query( orasql_store_sales_count_query.format(date_from, yesterday)) return result

Normally I would add query to function, but since we will always use the same query for this job, it can be hard coded into function itself.

Data fetched from each store looks like this:

store sale_date sales_count
X001 2022-05-02 100
X001 2022-05-03 412
X001 2022-05-04 96

Fetch data with threads in seconds

Then we create function that iterates over query_data_from_store with stores list using 20 threads at once:

def process_data(): """ Process data fetched from stores """ # Create connection with pre-erp database
 logger.info("Connecting to PRE-ERP Database and getting the sales count.") warehouse = SqlServerConnection(STAGING_HOST, STAGING_DB) # Get production stores into list
 stores_df = warehouse.query(mssql_prod_stores_list) stores_list = stores_df["store"].to_list() # Remove badly configured stores, for testing / debug purposes:
 unwanted_stores = {"X1234", "X002", "X3596","X991"} stores_list = [element for element in stores_list if element not in unwanted_stores] # Iterate over query function using 20 threads using stores list
 pool = multiprocessing.Pool(20) result = pool.map(query_data_from_store, stores_list) pool.close() pool.join() return result

Analyze the anomalies

Last is to analyze data (normally we put results into table and than it is visualized as errors in our BI).

For article purposes we write down all inconsistencies that we found during our comparison into files:

def check_store_receipts_integrity(): """Check sales data integrity using direct stores connection.""" date_from = last_year multiprocessing.freeze_support() start_data_fetch_time = timer() results = process_data() pos_quantity = pd.concat(results, ignore_index=True, axis=0) end_data_fetch_time = timer() # Create connection with PRE-ERP database
 warehouse = SqlServerConnection(STAGING_HOST, STAGING_DB) start_processing_time = timer() # Get receipts count per store and day from sales table
 target_quantity = warehouse.query( mssql_get_target_receipts_count.format(date_from, yesterday)) # Some type refactoring
 store_quantity.store = store_quantity.store.astype(str) store_quantity.sale_date = store_quantity.sale_date.astype(str) target_quantity.store = target_quantity.store.astype(str) target_quantity.sale_date = target_quantity.sale_date.astype(str) # Merge dataframes with stores quantity
 logger.info("Merging both data sources into one.") difference_temp = pd.merge(target_quantity, store_quantity, how="left", on=["store", "sale_date"]) # Generate differences
 logger.info("Generating differences.") difference_temp["difference"] = ( difference_temp["store_quantity"] - difference_temp["target_quantity"]) missing_in_target = difference_temp[difference_temp["difference"] > 0] # Print info about differences in console
 logger.info("Checking if differences exist.") if len(missing_in_target) > 0: logger.warning("The inconsistency in data has been found. Starting row by row comparison...") # Get missing in target sales data
 logger.info("Generating temp variables.") receipts_from_store= pd.DataFrame() receipts_from_target = pd.DataFrame() results_from_stores_and_target = pd.DataFrame() if str(type(missing_in_target)) in """<class 'pandas.core.frame.DataFrame'>""": missing_in_target_list = missing_in_target[["store", "receipt_date"]] for i, row in missing_in_terg_list.iterrows(): store: str = str(row["store"]) sale_date: str = str(row["sale_date"]) server: str = str(store + "ORASERV") logger.info(f"Connecting to store: {store} with date: {sale_date}") store_connection = OracleConnection( server, STORE_USR, STORE_PWD, STORE_SID, 666) temp_stores = store_connection.query( orasql_get_store_receipts_for_specific_day.format(receipt_date)) receipts_from_store = pd.concat([receipts_from_store, temp_stores], ignore_index=True, axis=0) temp_target = warehouse.query(mssql_get_target_receipts_for_specific_day.format(store, receipt_date)) receipts_from_target = pd.concat([receipts_from_target, temp_target], ignore_index=True, axis=0) receipts_from_store["erp_number"] = receipts_from_store["store"] + "/" + receipts_from_market[ "salenumber"] receipts_from_target["erp_number"] = receipts_from_target["store"] + "/" + receipts_from_target[ "document_number"] if receipts_from_store.equals(receipts_from_target) is False: results_from_stores_and_target= pd.merge(receipts_from_stores, receipts_from_target, how="left", on="ax_number" , indicator=True) results_from_stores_and_target = results_from_stores_and_target.rename(columns={ "store_x": "store", "sale_date_x": "date", "sale_id_x": "id", "sale_number_x": "number", "sale_value_x": "value", "erp_number": "erpnumber", "store_y": "store", "sale_date_y": "saledate", "sale_id_y": "saleid", "sale_number_y": "salenumber", "sale_value_y": "salevalue", "_merge": "ismissing"} ) else: logger.info("Compared data row by row and found nothing.") if len(results_from_stores_and_target) > 0: # warehouse.push_data(results_from_stores_and_target, 'stores_integrity_report', 'staging')
 if os.path.exists("./data/processed/store_integrity_checks.csv"): os.remove("./data/processed/store_integrity_checks.csv") logger.info("Cleaning .csv file for reimport.") else: logger.warning("The .csv file does not exist...") if os.path.exists("./data/processed/store_integrity_checks.xlsx"): os.remove("./data/processed/store_integrity_checks.xlsx") logger.info("Cleaning .xlsx file for reimport.") else: logger.warning("The .xlsx file does not exist...") results_from_stores_and_target = results_from_stores_and_target[ results_from_stores_and_target["ismissing"] == "left_only"] results_from_stores_and_target.to_csv("./data/processed/pos_integrity_checks.csv", index=False) results_from_stores_and_target.to_excel("./data/processed/pos_integrity_checks.xlsx", index=False) if len(results_from_stores_and_target) > 0: logger.warning( f"Found and exported: {len(results_from_stores_and_target)} inconsistencies to file.") else: logger.info("There are no missing sales in PRE-ERP.") end_processing_time = timer() logger.info(f"Fetched rows from stores in: {(end_data_fetch_time - start_data_fetch_time):0.4f} " f"seconds, while data processing took: {(end_processing_time - start_processing_time):0.4f}.")

Voula!

Not only we compared data from multiple sources with our target database, but also used parallelism that speeds up our processing from 30 minutes to about minute or so.
item.author: mikelogaciuk

item.title: postgresql c++ 插入语句 | postgresql c++ insert statement
item.description:
伊克努尔格

发表于我是 PostgreSQL 的新手。 我在 C++ 中有一个 mysql 插入查询。 你可以在下面看到它。 我想将 mysql db 转换为 postgresql。
我为此使用#include。

这是我的mysql代码：
这是一个带有 pqexec 的简单插入语句。


 我如何根据 postgresql 转换这部分？

pstmt->setString(1, root.get("MAC","null").asString());
pstmt->setString(2, pars);



原文:

ilknurgg

Posted on May 26

Im a newbie in PostgreSQL. I have a mysql insert query in c++. You can see it below. I want to convert mysql db to postgresql.
Im using #include for it.

Here is my mysql code:
`


pstmt = con->prepareStatement("INSERT INTO public.comp_inventory(epp_mac_address,epp_data) VALUES (?,?)");

pstmt->setString(1, root.get("MAC","null").asString());
pstmt->setString(2, pars);

pstmt->execute(); }

`


`

`

Here is an simple insert statement with pqexec.


ress = PQexec(conn, "INSERT INTO public.device VALUES('1','Audi','52642')");

if (PQresultStatus(ress) != PGRES_COMMAND_OK) { std::cout << "insert failed: " << PQresultErrorMessage(ress) << std::endl; } else { std::cout << "insert counts: " << PQcmdTuples(ress) << std::endl; } PQclear(ress);

}`

`

how can i convert this part according to postgresql??

pstmt->setString(1, root.get("MAC","null").asString());
pstmt->setString(2, pars);
item.author: ilknurgg

item.title: 无服务器架构以及为什么需要它 | Serverless Architecture and Why you Need it
item.description:
无服务器架构及其相关技术已经存在了大约五年。 在这五年中，无服务器架构已成为寻求构建应用程序的中小型企业的首选运营模式，为您的企业以及您的客户和用户带来了多重好处。

功能即服务

首先，让我们澄清一件事。 运行您的应用程序仍然需要托管在一块硬件上的软件的功能。 您正在构建的应用程序仅由第三方服务提供商托管，无需开发人员进行服务器管理。

正在构建的应用程序和软件是事件触发的，并在由第三方服务提供商管理的无状态计算容器中运行。 您只需为使用的计算能力付费。

在应用程序前端的职责方面，要求开发者构建用户界面和客户端能力。 在后端，他/她需要构建服务器端逻辑。 另一方面，FaaS 提供商需要为构建的应用程序提供托管、扩展、优化和模块化。

在 FaaS 中，开发人员只需将他们的代码上传到服务上，服务提供商负责配置资源和实例化虚拟机。 通过为开发人员提供专注于前端功能而不是后端架构的机会，无服务器架构使开发人员的工作变得更加容易。

在 CloudNow Technologies，我们提供全面的云咨询服务，包括分析您当前的工作流程和操作流程，以确定您的应用程序是否需要无服务器架构。 有关无服务器架构以及我们如何帮助您实现目标的更多信息，请立即与我们联系。



原文:

Serverless architecture and its associated technologies have been around for about five years now. In these five years, serverless architecture has gained significant traction as the go-to operational model for small and medium-sized businesses looking to build applications, with multiple benefits for your business as well as for your clients and users.

Function as a Service

First, let’s make one thing clear. “Serverless” does not mean the complete lack of a server. Running your application still requires the capabilities of software hosted on a piece of hardware. The application you are building is simply hosted by a third-party service provider, eliminating the need for server management by your developers.

The applications and software being built are event-triggered and run in stateless compute containers which are managed by third-party service providers. Amazon Web Services’ Lambda is a popular example of providing Function as a Service, where the applications built are run without the provisioning or management of servers by the organization building the application. You will only have to pay for the computing power used.

In terms of responsibilities at the front-end of the application, the developer is required to build the user interface and the client side capabilities. In the back end, he/she is required to build the server side logic. The FaaS providers, on the other hand, are required to provide hosting, scaling, optimization and modularity for the application built.

In FaaS, the developers simply have to upload their code on to the service and the service providers take care of provisioning resources and instantiating virtual machines. By providing developers with the opportunity to focus on the front-end functionalities instead of the backend architecture, serverless architecture is making the job of developers much easier.

At CloudNow Technologies, we provide comprehensive cloud consulting services including analyzing your current workflow and operational flow to determine if your applications require a serverless architecture. Cloud now technologies offers cloud advisory services for clients. For more information about serverless architecture and how we can help you get there, do get in touch with us now.
item.author: arjun_76

item.title: 如何使用 React Native AsyncStorage | How To Use React Native AsyncStorage
item.description:
数据的持久化是在键值存储系统中完成的。

有许多场景可以使此模块受益。 在移动应用程序中持久化数据有好处，例如当用户重新启动应用程序时，数据或设置变量在用户关闭应用程序之前的状态下可供用户使用。 本教程将介绍此场景。

在此GitHub 存储库中找到本教程的完整代码。

安装社区模块

这些包由社区成员和开源开发人员管理。

首先，让我们创建一个新的 React Native 项目并安装模块： @react-native-async-storage/async-storage 。 在终端窗口中，按照指定的顺序执行以下命令。

 # create a new react-native app npx react-native init rnAsyncStorageExample # navigate inside the project directory cd rnAsyncStorageExample # install the async-storage module yarn add @react-native-async-storage/async-storage # Or is you prefer to use npm npm install @react-native-async-storage/async-storage

如果您使用的是最新的 React Native 版本（ 0.60.x或更高版本），则无需手动链接 iOS 和 Android 平台的本机二进制文件。 模块的这种链接由 CLI 自动处理。 不过，对于 iOS，您必须安装cocoapods 。 返回终端窗口并执行以下命令：

这就是配置 AsyncStorage 模块以在 React Native 应用程序中工作的方式。

更改 Android 上的默认存储限制

在 iOS 设备上，AsyncStorage 不受编程限制。

在 Android 设备上，默认情况下，当前 AsyncStorage 大小设置为6MB 。 达到此限制将导致数据库或磁盘已满等错误。 存在此限制是有正当理由的，但如果需要增加大小，您可以这样做。 打开android/gradle.properties文件并添加以下内容：

 AsyncStorage_db_size_in_MB = 10

此文件表示可用于覆盖默认值或设置的任何项目设置。

现在，为确保一切正常，构建 Android 应用程序（并确保在执行以下命令之前运行 Android 设备或模拟器）。

 npx react-native run-android

您将看到确认应用程序已配置的默认屏幕。

同样，要为 iOS 构建应用程序，请执行以下命令：

使用 AsyncStorage API

让我们开始创建一个示例。 在此示例应用程序中，您将从用户输入中保存一个值到存储中并从存储中获取该值。 这种数据的读取和写入将在 AsyncStorage API 函数的帮助下完成。

打开App.js文件并首先导入以下组件。

 import React , { useState , useEffect } from ' react ' ; import { StyleSheet , View , Text , TextInput , TouchableOpacity , } from ' react-native ' ; import AsyncStorage from ' @react-native-community/async-storage ' ;

接下来，定义一个变量名STORAGE_KEY 。 它用于读取和保存数据。 您可以将此键视为正在存储的值的标识符，因此是键值存储系统。 由于您现在只存储一个值，因此只需要一个键。

 let STORAGE_KEY = ' @user_input ' ;

在功能组件App中，定义一个状态变量input ，其默认值为空字符串。

 const App = () => { const [ input , setInput ] = useState ( '' ); // ... }; export default App ;

保存数据

为了保存数据以供应用读取，让我们定义一个名为saveData的异步帮助器方法。 此方法将基于 Promise，这意味着您可以将async await语法与try-catch块一起使用。

传递标识符STORAGE_KEY以及input状态变量，API 方法AsyncStorage.setItem将把值存储在存储中。

让我们在成功存储数据时更新状态并显示警告框。

 const saveData = async () => { try { await AsyncStorage . setItem ( STORAGE_KEY , age ) alert ( ' Data successfully saved ' ) } catch ( e ) { alert ( ' Failed to save the data to the storage ' ) } } const saveData = async () => { try { await AsyncStorage . setItem ( STORAGE_KEY , age ) alert ( ' Data successfully saved ' ) } catch ( e ) { alert ( ' Failed to save the data to the storage ' ) } }

读取数据

当应用程序重新启动时，它应该能够读取上一节中持久化的数据。 为此，创建另一个名为readData的辅助函数，该函数将是异步的。 此函数将使用 API 方法AsyncStorage.getItem从存储中读取值，并且仅在其值不为null时设置状态变量输入的值。

 const readData = async () => { try { const value = await AsyncStorage . getItem ( STORAGE_KEY ); if ( value !== null ) { setInput ( value ); } } catch ( e ) { alert ( ' Failed to fetch the input from storage ' ); } };

要在应用程序启动时检索数据，请在useEffect挂钩中调用此方法。

 useEffect (() => { readData (); }, []);

清除所有存储

当前演示应用程序将从 AsyncStorage API 中使用的另一种 API 方法称为clear 。 此方法会删除之前保存的所有内容。

如果您只想从存储中删除特定项目，可以使用其他方法，例如 AsyncStorage API 的removeItem或multiRemove 。

添加以下代码段：

 const clearStorage = async () => { try { await AsyncStorage . clear (); alert ( ' Storage successfully cleared! ' ); } catch ( e ) { alert ( ' Failed to clear the async storage. ' ); } };

控制输入

此示例应用程序需要的最后两个辅助函数是onChangeText和onSubmitEditing 。

这些方法将负责读取输入和更新状态变量以及存储输入。

 const onChangeText = value => setInput ( value ); const onSubmitEditing = () => { if ( ! input ) return ; saveData ( input ); setInput ( '' ); };

完成应用程序

我们已经定义了应用程序所需的所有辅助函数。 让我们通过如下定义 JSX 来完成return语句：

 const App = () => { // ... rest of the code remains the same return ( < View style = { styles . container } > < View style = { styles . header } > < Text style = { styles . title } > AsyncStorage React Native < /Text > < /View > < View style = { styles . panel } > < Text style = { styles . label } > Enter your input here : < /Text > < TextInput style = { styles . inputField } value = { input } placeholder = " Enter " onChangeText = { onChangeText } onSubmitEditing = { onSubmitEditing } / > < Text style = { styles . text } > Your input is { input } < /Text > < Pressable onPress = { clearStorage } style = { styles . button } > < Text style = { styles . buttonText } > Clear Storage < /Text > < /Pressable > < /View > < /View > ); };

以下是上述代码片段的对应样式：

 const styles = StyleSheet . create ({ container : { flex : 1 , }, header : { width : ' 100% ' , backgroundColor : ' #dcdcdc ' , paddingTop : 48 , paddingBottom : 10 , borderBottomWidth : StyleSheet . hairlineWidth , alignItems : ' center ' , }, title : { fontSize : 22 , color : ' #333 ' , fontWeight : ' bold ' , }, panel : { paddingTop : 10 , paddingHorizontal : 10 , }, label : { fontSize : 20 , }, text : { fontSize : 24 , paddingTop : 10 , }, inputField : { backgroundColor : ' #fff ' , height : 44 , borderWidth : 1 , borderColor : ' #333 ' , width : ' 100% ' , padding : 10 , marginTop : 12 , }, button : { margin : 10 , padding : 10 , backgroundColor : ' orange ' , justifyContent : ' center ' , alignItems : ' center ' , borderRadius : 4 , }, buttonText : { fontSize : 18 , color : ' #444 ' , }, });

现在，回到 iOS 模拟器，您将看到以下屏幕：

接下来，输入一个值，关闭应用程序，然后打开应用程序以查看该值是否已存储。

最后，看看单击“清除存储”按钮时会发生什么。

结论

恭喜！ 我希望，在本教程中，您学习了在 React Native 应用程序中使用 AsyncStorage API 的基本 API 方法。 尽管演示应用程序很小，但它使我们能够理解这些概念。

这是AsyncStorage模块的完整 API 的链接，您可以参考以进一步阅读。

说到进一步阅读，不要错过我们的React Native Security指南和保护 React Native 应用程序的源代码免受代码篡改和逆向工程的教程。

. .


原文:

AsyncStorage is a simple, asynchronous, unencrypted by default module that allows you to persist data offline in React Native apps. The persistence of data is done in a key-value storage system.

There are numerous scenarios where this module can be beneficial. Persisting data in a mobile app has benefits such as when the user restarts the app, the data or the setting variables being available to the user in the state they left before closing the app. This scenario is going to be covered in this tutorial.

Find the complete code for this tutorial at this GitHub repo.

Installing the community module

React Native version 0.60.0+ has lots of its API modules available as separate packages that you can easily install with a package manager such as npm or yarn. These packages are managed by community members as well as open-source developers.

To begin, let us create a new React Native project and install the module: @react-native-async-storage/async-storage. From a terminal window, execute the following commands in the order they are specified.

# create a new react-native app
npx react-native init rnAsyncStorageExample # navigate inside the project directory
cd rnAsyncStorageExample # install the async-storage module
yarn add @react-native-async-storage/async-storage # Or is you prefer to use npm
npm install @react-native-async-storage/async-storage

If you are using the latest React Native version (0.60.x or above) you do not have to link the native binaries for iOS and Android platforms manually. This linking of the module is handled automatically by the CLI. Though, for iOS, you have to install cocoapods. Go back to the terminal window and execute the following command:

That's it in terms of configuring the AsyncStorage module to work in the React Native app.

Changing the default storage limitation on Android

On iOS devices, the AsyncStorage is not limited programmatically.

On Android devices, by default, the current AsyncStorage size is set to 6MB. Reaching this limit is going to result in errors like the database or disk being full. There are valid reasons why this limit exists but if there is a need to increase the size, you can do that. Open the android/gradle.properties file and add the following:

AsyncStorage_db_size_in_MB=10

This file represents any project-wise settings that you can use to override the default values or settings.

Now, to make sure everything is working correctly, build the Android app (and make sure an Android device or emulator is running before you execute the command below).

npx react-native run-android

You are going to get the default screen that confirms that the app is configured.

Similarly, to build the app for iOS, execute the command below:

Using the AsyncStorage API

Let's start creating an example. In this example application, you will save a value from the user's input in the storage and fetch the value from the storage. This reading and writing of data are going to be done with the help of AsyncStorage API functions.

Open the App.js file and start by importing the following components.

import React, {useState, useEffect} from 'react';
import { StyleSheet, View, Text, TextInput, TouchableOpacity,
} from 'react-native';
import AsyncStorage from '@react-native-community/async-storage';

Next, define a variable name STORAGE_KEY. It is used to read and save the data. You can think of this key as the identifier to the value that is being stored, hence, the key-value storage system. As you are going to store only one value at the moment, there is only one key required.

let STORAGE_KEY = '@user_input';

Inside the functional component App, define a state variable input that has an empty string as its default value.

const App = () => { const [input, setInput] = useState(''); // ...
}; export default App;

Saving the data

To save the data for the app to read, let us define an asynchronous helper method called saveData. This method is going to be promise-based, which means you can use the async await syntax with a try-catch block.

Passing the identifier STORAGE_KEY as well as the input state variable, the API method AsyncStorage.setItem is going to store the value in storage.

Let us update the state as well as display an alert box when the data is successfully stored.

const saveData = async () => { try { await AsyncStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, age) alert('Data successfully saved') } catch (e) { alert('Failed to save the data to the storage') }
}const saveData = async () => { try { await AsyncStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, age) alert('Data successfully saved') } catch (e) { alert('Failed to save the data to the storage') }
}

Reading the data

When the app restarts, it should be able to read the data that persisted in the previous section. For this, create another helper function called readData that is going to be asynchronous. This function is going to read the value from the storage using the API method AsyncStorage.getItem and will only set the value of the state variable input when its value is not null.

const readData = async () => { try { const value = await AsyncStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY); if (value !== null) { setInput(value); } } catch (e) { alert('Failed to fetch the input from storage'); }
};

To retrieve the data whenever the app starts, invoke this method inside the useEffect hook.

useEffect(() => { readData();
}, []);

Clearing all storage

Another API method that the current demo app is going to utilize from the AsyncStorage API is called clear. This method deletes everything that was previously saved.

If you want to delete only a specific item from the storage, there are other methods available such as removeItem or multiRemove by the AsyncStorage API.

Add the following snippet:

const clearStorage = async () => { try { await AsyncStorage.clear(); alert('Storage successfully cleared!'); } catch (e) { alert('Failed to clear the async storage.'); }
};

Controlling the input

The last two helper functions this example app requires are onChangeText and onSubmitEditing.

These methods are going to be responsible for reading the input and updating the state variable as well as storing the input.

const onChangeText = value => setInput(value); const onSubmitEditing = () => { if (!input) return; saveData(input); setInput('');
};

Completing the app

We have defined all the helper functions that are required by the app. Let us complete the return statement by defining the JSX as below:

const App = () => { // ... rest of the code remains the same return ( <View style={styles.container}> <View style={styles.header}> <Text style={styles.title}>AsyncStorage React Native</Text>
 </View>
 <View style={styles.panel}> <Text style={styles.label}>Enter your input here:</Text>
 <TextInput style={styles.inputField} value={input} placeholder="Enter" onChangeText={onChangeText} onSubmitEditing={onSubmitEditing} />
 <Text style={styles.text}>Your input is {input}</Text>
 <Pressable onPress={clearStorage} style={styles.button}> <Text style={styles.buttonText}>Clear Storage</Text>
 </Pressable>
 </View>
 </View>
 );
};

Here are the corresponding styles to the above code snippet:

const styles = StyleSheet.create({ container: { flex: 1, }, header: { width: '100%', backgroundColor: '#dcdcdc', paddingTop: 48, paddingBottom: 10, borderBottomWidth: StyleSheet.hairlineWidth, alignItems: 'center', }, title: { fontSize: 22, color: '#333', fontWeight: 'bold', }, panel: { paddingTop: 10, paddingHorizontal: 10, }, label: { fontSize: 20, }, text: { fontSize: 24, paddingTop: 10, }, inputField: { backgroundColor: '#fff', height: 44, borderWidth: 1, borderColor: '#333', width: '100%', padding: 10, marginTop: 12, }, button: { margin: 10, padding: 10, backgroundColor: 'orange', justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center', borderRadius: 4, }, buttonText: { fontSize: 18, color: '#444', },
});

Now, go back to the iOS simulator and you are going to be welcomed by the following screen:

Next, enter a value, close the app, and then open the app to see if the value was stored or not.

Lastly, see what happens when you click on the "Clear Storage" button.

Conclusion

Congratulations! I hope that, in this tutorial, you learned the basic API methods of using AsyncStorage API in your React Native app. Even though the demo app was minimal, it allowed us to understand the concepts.

Here is the link to the complete API for the AsyncStorage module that you can refer to for further reading.

And speaking of further reading, don't miss our guide on React Native Security and our tutorial on protecting the source code of React Native apps against code tampering and reverse-engineering.

.

item.title: 立即开始使用 TailwindCSS！ | Start Using TailwindCSS Now!
item.description:
介绍

如果您是 Web 开发人员，那么您可能听说过 Tailwind CSS。 它是一个基于实用程序的 CSS 框架，它使用 Atomic CSS 原则允许开发人员快速创建和修改网站。 但是值得学习另一种构建网站的新系统吗？ 在本文中，我将解释 TailwindCSS 是什么以及为什么值得花时间投资。

您可以将它与任何框架、网站或项目一起使用。 由于其简单的语法和结构，它也很容易学习和理解。

这使得 TailwindCSS 成为没有丰富 CSS 框架（甚至一般的前端开发）经验但想开始使用的初学者的绝佳选择； 退伍军人会喜欢它熟悉的语法以及他们可以轻松上手的难易程度。

您的 CSS 文件大小可能会小于 Bootstrap 的 **

应该使用 TailwindCSS 的第二个原因是它比 Bootstrap 小。 使用 Bootstrap，您必须包含他们所有的 JS 文件、默认 HTML 模板和 CSS 样式。 它的总大小可以超过 6MB！

现在将其与 TailwindCSS 进行比较：您只需要包含一个大小仅为 1KB 的文件（css/tailwind.min.css 文件）！ 它包含您整个网站的所有必要样式，而不会因其他组件或不必要的功能而产生任何额外的膨胀。 这使您的页面加载速度比使用 Bootstrap 或其他框架（如 Foundation 和 Semantic UI）更快，因为浏览器下载的数据更少 - 这意味着花费更多时间构建漂亮的东西，而不是等待页面加载！

类名可读**

使用 TailwindCSS，您的类名称简短、描述性强且易于阅读。 它们也很容易记住。

它对用户非常友好，并具有许多功能，例如 Autoprefixer（自动为 CSS 属性添加供应商前缀）、网格系统、动画等等！

使用这个框架最好的部分是你不必编写任何新的 CSS 类来让它们相互工作——它们就是这样做的！

比 Bootstrap 更容易定制，更高效

它也比 Bootstrap 更小，并且在处理大型网站或需要设计一致性的应用程序等大型项目时更有效。

该框架的设计理念是开发人员应该能够创建自己的组件，而无需查看数百行代码。 由于核心组件编写良好且开源，因此它们很容易修改和定制——您不必每次想要新的东西时都重新发明轮子！

结论

所以是的，这就是你应该开始使用 TailwindCSS 的原因。 这是一个很棒的工具，可以加快您的开发速度，让您更轻松地管理应用程序中的样式。 如果这听起来像是您想进一步了解的内容，请注册下面的免费在线课程。 和往常一样，如果有任何问题或疑虑，请在下面的评论部分告诉我！



原文:

**

Introduction

**

If you're a web developer, then you've probably heard of Tailwind CSS. It's a utility-based CSS framework that uses Atomic CSS principles to allow developers to quickly create and modify websites. But is it worth learning another new system for building websites? In this article, I'll explain what TailwindCSS is and why it's worth the time investment.

- It's easy to customize

TailwindCSS is a utility-first CSS framework that allows you to easily customize your styles. You can use it with any framework, website, or project. It’s also easy to learn and understand because of its simple syntax and structure.

This makes TailwindCSS a great choice for beginners who don’t have a lot of experience with CSS frameworks (or even front-end development in general) but want to start using one; veterans will appreciate its familiar syntax and the ease with which they can get started.

**

  • Your CSS file size will probably be smaller than Bootstrap's **

The second reason why you should use TailwindCSS is because it's smaller than Bootstrap. With Bootstrap, you have to include all of their JS files, default HTML templates, and CSS styles. The total size of this can be over 6MB!

Now compare that with TailwindCSS: you only need to include a single file (the css/tailwind.min.css file) which weighs in at just 1KB! It contains all the necessary styles for your entire website without any extra bloat from other components or unnecessary features. This makes your page load faster than using Bootstrap or other frameworks such as Foundation & Semantic UI because there is less data being downloaded by the browser — which means more time spent building beautiful things instead of waiting for pages to load!

**

  • Class names are readable **

With TailwindCSS, your class names are short, descriptive and easy to read. They're also easy to remember.

TailwindCSS makes writing CSS so much easier because it's made up of simple variables that you can use throughout your project. It's very user friendly and has a lot of features like Autoprefixer (which automatically adds vendor prefixes for CSS properties), grid system, animations and much more!

The best part about using this framework is the fact that you don't have to write any new CSS classes in order for them to work with each other - they just do!

It's easier to customize and more efficient than Bootstrap

TailwindCSS is a utility-first CSS framework that allows you to easily create your own custom styles. It's also smaller than Bootstrap, and more efficient at handling big projects like large websites or apps that need consistency in their design.

The biggest advantage of TailwindCSS is its simplicity. The framework was designed with the idea that developers should be able to create their own components without having to look through hundreds of lines of code. Because the core components are well-written and open source, they're easy to modify and customize—you don't have to reinvent the wheel every time you want something new!

**

Conclusion

**

So yeah, this is why you should start using TailwindCSS. It's a great tool that speeds up your development and makes it easier for you to manage styles in your application. If this sounds like something you want to learn more about, then sign up for the free online course below. And as always, let me know if there are any questions or concerns in the comments section below!
item.author: madflows

item.title: Electron 应用程序正在检查从根目录到当前目录的读/写访问权限 | Electron application is checking read/write access from root directory to current directory
item.description:
嘿，我们正在从 D:Common/Application/ElectronForAP 为 user1 启动电子应用程序。

在启动 ElectronForAP 应用程序时，它正在检查 D:、D:Common/、D:Common/Application/ 和 D:Common/Application/ElectronForAP 路径（从根目录到当前目录）中的写/读访问。

我们可以更改电子应用程序中的配置以停止检查 D:、D:Common/、D:Common/Application/ 目录中的读/写访问吗？



原文:

Hey we are launching electron application from D:Common/Application/ElectronForAP for user1.

While launching ElectronForAP application, it is checking write/read access in D:, D:Common/, D:Common/Application/ and D:Common/Application/ElectronForAP path (From root directory to current directory).

User1 has read/write access to D:Common/Application/ElectronForAP path but user1 does not have read/write access to D:, D:Common/, D:Common/Application/ directory .So ElectronForAP application is not launching.

Can we change configuration in electron application to stop checking read/write access in D:, D:Common/, D:Common/Application/ directory ?
